name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (per v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0+). v0.10.6 fixes a false-positive in _detect_branch_ci: the v0.10.4 substring-grep heuristic matched any Conventional Commits prefix anywhere in a workflow YAML — including paths-ignore filters. A real deploy-on-push-to-dev workflow with `paths-ignore: ['docs/**']` was misclassified as branch CI (because `docs/` matched the substring), causing wpx-pipeline to poll for 45 min waiting for check-runs that never appeared. Replaced with a structural parser that walks each .github/workflows/*.y[a]ml file looking specifically for `branches:` declarations (under on.push or on.pull_request), parsing inline lists and block lists. Explicitly rejects `branches-ignore`, `paths`, `paths-ignore`, `tags`, and comments. Two new regression tests pinned: paths-ignore must not register; branches-ignore must not register. v0.10.5 shipped the pytest test suite + two bug fixes (already-merged branch detection + multi-table INDEX parsing). v0.10.4 fixed emit_ok exit_code + no-branch-CI hang. v0.10.3 closed the auto-draft INDEX-registration gap. v0.10.2 fixed wpx-step12 dispatcher correctness. v0.10.1 fixed wpx-* tool discoverability. 43 tests across unit/ + integration/. Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03.
